# Cortex XSIAM Troy NUC Monitoring - Custom XQL Widget

**Dataset**: `alerts`

```sql
dataset = alerts
| filter host_name contains "SOC"
| comp count(alert_id) as alert_count by host_name
| sort desc alert_count
| limit 20
```
